case_title: MICHAEL C. MURAWSKI VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MURAWSKI, MICHAEL C.
